name: 1200km-portfolio
description: Source for https://1200km.com — Andrey Pautov, cybersecurity research portfolio (CTI, detection engineering, threat hunting, offensive labs).

scripts.check-search: node --test tests/search-index.test.mjs && node --check assets/site-search.js && node --check scripts/build-search-index.mjs && node --check scripts/check-search-browser.mjs && node --check scripts/check-search-index.mjs && node --check scripts/inject-search-loader.mjs && node --check scripts/search-index-lib.mjs
scripts.check-content: node scripts/build-content-catalog.mjs --check && node scripts/check-content-schema.mjs && node scripts/check-content-catalog.mjs && node --test tests/content-catalog.test.mjs

scripts.check-release-source: npm run check-code && npm run check-shell && npm run check-functional && npm run check-content && npm run check-articles && npm run check-search && npm run check-layout && npm run check-threat-matrix && npm run check-semantics && npm run check-facts && npm run check-adoption && npm run check-seo && npm run check-agent-readiness && npm run check-links && npm run check-hygiene
